hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *".env.local"* || "$file" == *".env.dev-auth.tpl"* ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: Never edit env files directly. Use: npm run env:inject' && exit 1 || exit 0

file=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *"package-lock.json"* ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: Never edit package-lock.json directly. Use npm install.' && exit 1 || exit 0

file=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]] && cd /Users/jb/clarity && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

file=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx || "$file" == *.js || "$file" == *.jsx ]] && cd /Users/jb/clarity && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1 | tail -10 || true
